message:
feat: Add two-flow type system infrastructure (certain/uncertain)

Add TypeConfidence tracking to enable safe type handling:
- Certain types: Use raw Zig types (i64, f64, etc.) for performance
- Uncertain types: Use PyValue for safety (no runtime panics)

Changes:
- core.zig: Add TypeConfidence enum, TypeSource enum, TypedValue struct
- inferrer.zig: Add confidence tracking maps and helper methods
  - putTypedVar, getTypedVar, getConfidence
  - isCertain, isUncertain, degradeConfidence
  - Auto-degrade confidence when type is widened to different type

This is the foundation for preventing runtime panics from wrong
type inference. Codegen integration to follow.
